response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 14+ years of experience and current AI agent infrastructure work, but notable gaps in primary stack (React, Nest.js, Vitest) where candidate has Ember.js and other frameworks instead. Identity verification needed due to mismatch between resume name (Aisha Okonkwo) and digital footprint (Bogdan Szabo across GitHub, LinkedIn, email). Candidate would require technical ramp-up on specific frameworks.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and infrastructure expertise spanning 14+ years with TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS CDK
Current role demonstrates AI agent development and MCP framework experience directly relevant to job requirements
Proven ability to design scalable systems handling millions of requests and strong architectural thinking across multiple domains
concerns: No demonstrated experience with React (primary stack); background is Ember.js—may require significant frontend ramp-up
Nest.js and Vitest not mentioned despite being primary stack; testing background is in Jest, Trial, and other frameworks
Resume identity mismatch (name is Aisha Okonkwo but GitHub/LinkedIn/email reference Bogdan Szabo)—requires verification before proceeding

key_factors.factor: Full-stack experience depth and AI agent infrastructure
